subject_output:
```yaml
# Embergrave Level: fault_lines_07_the_chasm
# Tier: 3 (Fault Lines)
# Description: Vertical descent through a fault line shaft with narrow ledges and platforms

name: "The Chasm"
region: "fault_lines"
difficulty: 3
length: "medium"
time_estimate: "3:00"

# Initial player state
player:
  x: 100
  y: 50
  ember: 10

# Level geometry - vertical shaft with platforms
geometry:
  # Shaft walls
  walls:
    - {x: 0, y: 0, width: 20, height: 400}   # Left wall
    - {x: 180, y: 0, width: 20, height: 400} # Right wall
  
  # Platforms (6 total)
  platforms:
    # Platform 1 - Starting platform
    - {x: 80, y: 100, width: 40, height: 10}
    
    # Platform 2 - Narrow ledge
    - {x: 120, y: 150, width: 20, height: 10}
    
    # Platform 3 - Wide platform
    - {x: 60, y: 200, width: 80, height: 10}
    
    # Platform 4 - Narrow ledge
    - {x: 130, y: 250, width: 20, height: 10}
    
    # Platform 5 - Wide platform
    - {x: 70, y: 300, width: 60, height: 10}
    
    # Platform 6 - Narrow ledge
    - {x: 125, y: 350, width: 20, height: 10}
  
  # Void/lava area at bottom (lethal)
  lava:
    - {x: 0, y: 380, width: 200, height: 20}

# Checkpoints
checkpoints:
  - x: 100
    y: 180
    id: "checkpoint_1"
    
  - x: 100
    y: 330
    id: "checkpoint_2"

# Ember pickups (4 total, worth ~8 ember)
pickups:
  - x: 90
    y: 120
    value: 2
    
  - x: 130
    y: 220
    value: 2
    
  - x: 80
    y: 320
    value: 2
    
  - x: 135
    y: 370
    value: 2

# Exit point
exit:
  x: 100
  y: 390
  width: 20
  height: 10

# Level metadata
metadata:
  author: "Embergrave Team"
  version: "1.0"
  description: "Descend through a fault line shaft with narrow ledges and platforms. 
                Navigate carefully - the chasm below is deadly."
```
